translations.en: a little, white haired man hunched over with age.
translations.zh: 一位白髮蒼蒼、因老態而佝僂的矮小男子。

translations.en: "Back, back, back they come." He smiles to himself and claps his hands.
translations.zh: 「回來了，回來了，又回來了。」他自顧自地微笑，拍著手。

translations.en: "Yes, yes, yes," he says, bobbing his head up and down.
translations.zh: 「是是是，」他上下點著頭說道。

translations.en: "@Thindle the spindler." He grins at you.
translations.zh: 「@Thindle（辛德爾）紡線匠。」他咧嘴朝汝笑。

translations.en: "Yes, yes, yes. That was quite a guess!"
translations.zh: 「是是是，猜得不錯！」

translations.en: "Oh my, oh my, you must need cloth."
translations.zh: 「哎呀，哎呀，汝一定是需要布料。」

translations.en: "Come to my shop when I'm open and I'll sell you some!"
translations.zh: 「待在下開門時來鋪子，在下賣些給汝！」

translations.en: "Sell, now, its thread I feel."
translations.zh: 「賣，原來是要賣線，在下感覺到了。」

translations.en: "Come to my shop when I'm open and I'll buy it!"
translations.zh: 「待在下開門時來鋪子，在下收購！」

translations.en: "Sew, sew, I @sew 'cause I said so."
translations.zh: 「縫縫縫，在下@sew（縫紉），因為在下說了算。」

translations.en: "Beautiful @clothes, more pretty than those," he points to your stomach.
translations.zh: 「美麗的@clothes（衣裳），比那些更漂亮，」他指著汝的腹部說。

translations.en: "Yes again, friend!"
translations.zh: 「正是，朋友！」

translations.en: "Shorty is my friend. We play @flippits together."
translations.zh: 「矮冬瓜是我朋友，我們一起玩@flippits（骨彈）戲。」

translations.en: "Silk? Oh no, oh no."
translations.zh: 「絲綢？哎不行，哎不行。」

translations.en: "Can't work silk, oh my, no."
translations.zh: 「在下不會處理絲綢，哎不行。」

translations.en: "See @Charlotte. She can, yes she can!"
translations.zh: 「去找@Charlotte（夏綠）蒂，她行，是的她行！」

translations.en: "Humble Charlotte, yes. She can help you."
translations.zh: 「謙遜的夏綠蒂，是的，她能幫汝。」

translations.en: "She lives in New Magincia."
translations.zh: 「她住在新馬精西亞。」

translations.en: "You should learn, you should learn."
translations.zh: 「汝應該學，汝應該學。」

translations.en: "A nice piece of bone and a small hard @pea--that's all ya need."
translations.zh: 「一塊好骨頭和一顆小硬@pea（豌豆）——就這些就夠了。」

translations.en: "Like an old dog bone. You'll need a @hat too."
translations.zh: 「就像條舊狗骨頭，汝還需要一頂@hat（帽子）。」

translations.en: "The smaller, the better." He pulls an old @bone from his pocket and a small pea.
translations.zh: 「越小越好。」他從口袋裡掏出一塊舊@bone（骨頭）和一顆小豌豆。

translations.en: "Now you get a @hat."
translations.zh: 「現在去找頂@hat（帽子）。」

translations.en: He puts the hat down and mumbles "Put the pea in front of bone..."
translations.zh: 他放下帽子，喃喃道：「把豌豆放在骨頭前面……」

translations.en: He gestures with his hands. "...and flippit on home." The pea sails into the hat.
translations.zh: 他用手比劃著，「……彈它回家。」豌豆飛入帽子中。

translations.en: "Bye now. Bye. Say hi to @Mortude if you see him."
translations.zh: 「再見了，再見。見到@Mortude（莫圖）德代在下問好。」

translations.en: He scratches his head and looks around.
translations.zh: 他搔搔頭，四下張望。

translations.en: "Which of you?"
translations.zh: 「汝們誰？」

translations.en: "Very well, but 'tis fine cloth, yes indeed..."
translations.zh: 「好吧，但這是上等布料，是的確是……」

translations.en: "It'll cost you 15 gold for the cloth. Interested?"
translations.zh: 「這塊布料要15金，有興趣嗎？」

translations.en: "You look pretty full to me."
translations.zh: 「汝看起來已裝得滿滿的了。」

translations.en: "Excellent!" After accepting $Y's gold, $N hands over the cloth.
translations.zh: 「太好了！」收下$Y的金幣後，$N遞出布料。

translations.en: "No discounts, friend. Sorry."
translations.zh: 「不打折，朋友，抱歉。」

translations.en: "Very well, but 'tis fine cloth, yes indeed..."
translations.zh: 「好吧，但這是上等布料，是的確是……」

translations.en: "Sorry, none of you has anything I need."
translations.zh: 「抱歉，汝們沒有在下需要的東西。」

translations.en: "Which of you?"
translations.zh: 「汝們誰？」

translations.en: "Very well, very well, I can see you don't want to sell."
translations.zh: 「好吧好吧，在下看出汝不想賣。」

translations.en: "Sorry, you don't have any thread."
translations.zh: 「抱歉，汝沒有線。」

translations.en: $N turns to $Y, and says "Will you take 6 gold for that Thread?"
translations.zh: $N轉向$Y，說：「那線6金，汝肯賣嗎？」

translations.en: "Done!" He hands $Y 6 gold pieces and takes the thread.
translations.zh: 「成交！」他遞給$Y 6枚金幣，取走線。

translations.en: "Very well, very well, I can see you don't want to sell."
translations.zh: 「好吧好吧，在下看出汝不想賣。」

translator_notes: 100 Thindle: 布料商兼紡線匠，說話帶重複口癖（是是是/哎呀哎呀）。與莫圖德是玩骨彈戲的好友。flippits=骨彈戲（骨頭+豌豆+帽子的遊戲）。
